customer_anxiety_profile: Wilfred is on disability income with late mortgage payments and late fees — financially stressed and on a fixed income. He is not hostile, but he is cautious about certainty claims ('Are you sure?'). His $800 bill is a genuine pain point and he is actively engaged with it (planning a utility call). He responds to directness and plain language.
unresolved_concerns: Credit score unknown — disability income and late fees suggest potential sub-670 exposure; closer should not assume qualification
Bill not collected — Wilfred's paper bill was kept by Kroger cashier; online login just discovered; closer should plan to collect bill at start of appointment
Wife on title not included in Monday callback — appointment is structurally fragile without her present
No specific Monday time locked — callback is soft, not a sit-eligible appointment
Wilfred is calling the utility Monday for more information on the $800 bill — closer should ask what he learned before proceeding
sensitive_topics_raised: Disability income — Wilfred disclosed he is on disability and receives payments after the 15th, causing late mortgage fees
$800 utility bill — Wilfred is disputing or investigating this charge; it is abnormal by his own account
Late mortgage payments and late fees — direct credit risk signal
Financial stress — multiple overlapping financial pressures disclosed in a single breath
exact_promises_rep_made: Bucky said 'I'll text you — this is Bucky with Ion'
Bucky implied a design would be ready by Monday ('it'll take me a second to work on your design, so I can get that ready by Monday')
closer_should_know: Wilfred has genuine intent — he closed the call by volunteering he's calling the utility Monday to get more bill information. But the appointment is structurally fragile: no time locked, wife on title not included, credit score unknown with disability/late-fee exposure. The 'design ready by Monday' promise Bucky made is a closer-tier deliverable the setter had no authority to promise — address this early. Lead the Monday call by asking what Wilfred learned from the utility, include the wife, and collect the bill before proceeding to the design.
